concerns.text: T015 (generate dataset size report) is ordered BEFORE T016 (save raw/cleaned data). A report counting records cannot be generated before the data file exists. T015 must follow T016 to respect producer-before-consumer ordering.

T047-T050 (checksums, excluded knots logging, validation scope docs) are grouped in Phase 6 but should execute closer to their data-generation tasks. T050 (log excluded knots) should follow T017 (filter to hyperbolic knots) immediately, not be delayed to final polish phase. T047 (checksums) should run after ALL data files are created, not just after T016.

T027 (flag records in validator.py) depends on T014 (implement validator in Phase 3). The ordering is correct, but T027 should be grouped with T043-T044 (flagging system implementation) since they modify the same file. Consider consolidating validator.py work to avoid interleaved file modifications across phases.

T041 (document source independence assessment) is placed in US3 (Phase 5) but the assessment should happen during data validation (Phase 3, T018). Moving T041 earlier would allow the validation approach to be informed by source independence findings.
